tools.name: calculate
tools.description: Calculate the result of a mathematical expression.

expression.description: The mathematical expression to calculate, such as '2 + 2'. The expression can contain numbers, operators (+, -, *, /), parentheses, and spaces.

output.description: The result of the mathematical expression as a string.

tools.name: cancel_pending_order
tools.description: Cancel a pending order. If the order is already processed or delivered, it cannot be cancelled. The agent needs to explain the cancellation detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed. If the user confirms, the order status will be changed to 'cancelled' and the payment will be refunded. The refund will be added to the user's gift card balance immediately if the payment was made using a gift card, otherwise the refund would take 5-7 business days to process.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.

reason.description: The reason for cancellation, which should be either 'no longer needed' or 'ordered by mistake'.

output.description: The order details after the cancellation.

tools.name: exchange_delivered_order_items
tools.description: Exchange items in a delivered order to new items of the same product type. For a delivered order, return or exchange can be only done once by the agent. The agent needs to explain the exchange detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.

item_ids.description: The item ids to be exchanged, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list.

new_item_ids.description: The item ids to be exchanged for, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list. Each new item id should match the item id in the same position and be of the same product.

payment_method_id.description: The payment method id to pay or receive refund for the item price difference, such as 'gift_card_0000000' or 'credit_card_0000000'. These can be looked up from the user or order details.

output.description: The order details after the exchange.

exchange_new_items.description: New item IDs replacing the exchanged items

tools.name: find_user_id_by_name_zip
tools.description: Find user id by first name, last name, and zip code. If the user is not found, the function will return an error message. By default, find user id by email, and only call this function if the user is not found by email or cannot remember email.

first_name.description: The first name of the customer, such as 'John'.

last_name.description: The last name of the customer, such as 'Doe'.

zip.description: The zip code of the customer, such as '12345'.

output.description: The user id if found, otherwise an error message.

tools.name: find_user_id_by_email
tools.description: Find user id by email. If the user is not found, the function will return an error message.

email.description: The email of the user, such as 'something@example.com'.

output.description: The user id if found, otherwise an error message.

tools.name: get_order_details
tools.description: Get the status and details of an order.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.

output.description: The order details including status, items, address, fulfillments, and payment history.

status.description: Order status (pending, processed, delivered, cancelled, exchange requested, return requested)

items.description: Items in the order with name, product_id, item_id, price, options

tools.name: get_product_details
tools.description: Get the inventory details of a product.

product_id.description: The product id, such as '6086499569'. Be careful the product id is different from the item id.

output.description: The product details including name, product_id, and all variants with their options, availability, and prices.

variants.description: Dictionary of variants indexed by item_id, each with options, availability, and price

tools.name: get_user_details
tools.description: Get the details of a user, including their orders.

output.description: The user details including name, address, email, payment methods, and order IDs.

name.description: User's full name with first_name and last_name

payment_methods.description: Dictionary of payment methods (credit_card, gift_card, paypal)

orders.description: List of order IDs associated with this user

tools.name: list_all_product_types
tools.description: List the name and product id of all product types. Each product type has a variety of different items with unique item ids and options. There are only 50 product types in the store.

output.description: A JSON string mapping product names to their product IDs, sorted alphabetically by name.

tools.name: modify_pending_order_address
tools.description: Modify the shipping address of a pending order. The agent needs to explain the modification detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.

address1.description: The first line of the address, such as '123 Main St'.

address2.description: The second line of the address, such as 'Apt 1' or ''.

output.description: The order details after the address modification.

tools.name: modify_pending_order_items
tools.description: Modify items in a pending order to new items of the same product type. For a pending order, this function can only be called once. The agent needs to explain the exchange detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.

item_ids.description: The item ids to be modified, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list.

new_item_ids.description: The item ids to be modified for, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list. Each new item id should match the item id in the same position and be of the same product.

payment_method_id.description: The payment method id to pay or receive refund for the item price difference, such as 'gift_card_0000000' or 'credit_card_0000000'. These can be looked up from the user or order details.

output.description: The order details after the item modification.

payment_history.description: Updated payment history with price difference transaction

tools.name: modify_pending_order_payment
tools.description: Modify the payment method of a pending order. The agent needs to explain the modification detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.

payment_method_id.description: The payment method id to pay or receive refund for the item price difference, such as 'gift_card_0000000' or 'credit_card_0000000'. These can be looked up from the user or order details.

output.description: The order details after the payment method modification.

payment_history.description: Updated payment history showing the payment swap

tools.name: modify_user_address
tools.description: Modify the default address of a user. The agent needs to explain the modification detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed.

address1.description: The first line of the address, such as '123 Main St'.

address2.description: The second line of the address, such as 'Apt 1' or ''.

output.description: The user details after the address modification.

tools.name: return_delivered_order_items
tools.description: Return some items of a delivered order. The order status will be changed to 'return requested'. The agent needs to explain the return detail and ask for explicit user confirmation (yes/no) to proceed. The user will receive follow-up email for how and where to return the item.

order_id.description: The order id, such as '#W0000000'. Be careful there is a '#' symbol at the beginning of the order id.

item_ids.description: The item ids to be returned, each such as '1008292230'. There could be duplicate items in the list.

payment_method_id.description: The payment method id to pay or receive refund for the item price difference, such as 'gift_card_0000000' or 'credit_card_0000000'. These can be looked up from the user or order details.

output.description: The order details after requesting the return.

tools.name: transfer_to_human_agents
tools.description: Transfer the user to a human agent, with a summary of the user's issue. Only transfer if the user explicitly asks for a human agent, or given the policy and the available tools, you cannot solve the user's issue.

summary.description: A summary of the user's issue.

output.description: A message indicating the user has been transferred to a human agent.
